cross_disciplinary_pairing.description: Offline RAG-powered groundnut advisory for Nigerian smallholder farmers using ICRISAT and IAR Zaria extension documents. Runs entirely on CPU with no cloud dependency.

test_prompts.prompt: What is the recommended NPK fertilizer rate per hectare for groundnut cultivation in Nigeria?
My groundnut leaves are yellowing and plants look stunted in Kaduna. What disease is this and how do I control it?
